title: Netherite Elytra
description: Never lose your elytra to lava again
body:
### **Features**
  
   Adds a netherite elytra to the game with some advatages:
  - The elytra cannot burn in lava
  - It has increased durability
  - It gives a bit of knockback resistance
  
 It's crafted with a smithing table like this:
  
  ![A smithing table UI displaying the crafting recipe for the netherite elytra, using a netherite upgrade, an elytra, and a netherite ingot.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15de5e0ec056e0416e0a0923f7be947cd3217202.png)
